description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a matte black finish on the top, likely covered with grippy grip tape. The deck is constructed from layered wood, visible along the thin edge, and is supported by two metal trucks attached to the underside. Each truck holds a pair of small, hard, light gray wheels, typical for street or park skateboards. The top surface is plain, with no visible graphics or branding, and the grip tape appears unadorned. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban environments such as skate parks, sidewalks, or streets.
description: A minimalistic skateboard with a matte black deck, plain grip tape, metal trucks, and small gray wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, both trucks, and wheels clearly visible.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the rounded nose or tail and the width of the black deck.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the full length and both trucks and wheels.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, showing the rounded shape and deck width.
attribute_wheel_type: street, small, hard, light gray, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard kingpin, metallic silver, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
